# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: ci-cd-debug
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  debug-ci-cd:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      ACTIONS_STEP_DEBUG: true
      ACTIONS_RUNNER_DEBUG: true

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Log event payload
        run: |
          echo "=== github.event ==="
          cat "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH"

      - name: Log runner and job context
        run: |
          echo "=== Runner Info ==="
          echo "OS: $RUNNER_OS"
          echo "Name: $RUNNER_NAME"
          echo "Temp: $RUNNER_TEMP"
          echo "Workspace: $GITHUB_WORKSPACE"
          echo "=== GitHub Context ==="
          echo "Repository: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          echo "Ref: $GITHUB_REF"
          echo "SHA: $GITHUB_SHA"
          echo "Actor: $GITHUB_ACTOR"
          echo "Workflow: $GITHUB_WORKFLOW"
          echo "Job: $GITHUB_JOB"
          echo "Run ID: $GITHUB_RUN_ID"
          echo "Run Number: $GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER"
          echo "Event Name: $GITHUB_EVENT_NAME"
          echo "Repository Owner: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER"

      - name: Log all environment variables
        run: |
          echo "=== Environment Variables ==="
          printenv | sort

      - name: Log git status and commit details
        run: |
          echo "=== Git Status ==="
          git status --short --branch
          echo "=== Git Log ==="
          git log --oneline -n 10
          echo "=== Current Commit ==="
          git show --stat --summary --decorate --no-patch HEAD

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          fi

      - name: Run build and capture output
        id: build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          mkdir -p logs
          {
            echo "=== Build Started ==="
            date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"
            if [ -f package.json ]; then
              npm run build
            else
              echo "No build script found"
            fi
            echo "=== Build Finished ==="
            date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"
          } 2>&1 | tee logs/build.log

      - name: Log deployment details
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Details ==="
          echo "Target Environment: production"
          echo "Deployment Timestamp: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
          echo "Deployer: $GITHUB_ACTOR"
          echo "Source Ref: $GITHUB_REF"
          echo "Source SHA: $GITHUB_SHA"
          echo "Deployment URL: ${DEPLOYMENT_URL:-not-set}"
          echo "Service Name: ${SERVICE_NAME:-not-set}"
          echo "Region: ${DEPLOY_REGION:-not-set}"

      - name: Log API response
        id: api
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          mkdir -p logs
          API_URL="${API_URL:-https://example.com/api/health}"
          RESPONSE_FILE="logs/api-response.json"
          curl -sS -D logs/api-headers.txt -o "$RESPONSE_FILE" -w "%{http_code}\n" "$API_URL" | tee logs/api-status.txt
          echo "=== API Headers ==="
          cat logs/api-headers.txt
          echo "=== API Response Body ==="
          cat "$RESPONSE_FILE"
          echo "=== API Status Code ==="
          cat logs/api-status.txt

      - name: Log connection strings
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "=== Connection Strings ==="
          echo "DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-not-set}"
          echo "REDIS_URL=${REDIS_URL:-not-set}"
          echo "MESSAGE_QUEUE_URL=${MESSAGE_QUEUE_URL:-not-set}"
          echo "PRIMARY_CONNECTION_STRING=${PRIMARY_CONNECTION_STRING:-not-set}"

      - name: Deploy application
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          mkdir -p logs
          {
            echo "=== Deployment Command ==="
            echo "Starting deployment at $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
            if [ -f deploy.sh ]; then
              bash deploy.sh
            elif [ -f package.json ] && jq -e '.scripts.deploy' package.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              npm run deploy
            else
              echo "No deployment script found"
            fi
            echo "=== Deployment Complete ==="
            date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"
          } 2>&1 | tee logs/deploy.log

      - name: Upload logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ci-cd-debug-logs
          path: logs/
